readinessPipeline.concept: Credit & Funding readiness follows a checklist-based pipeline from research to application submission. Each gate requires approval before advancing.

stages.name: Research Discovery
stages.description: Identify funding opportunities, credit products, and eligibility criteria

stages.name: Readiness Assessment
stages.description: Evaluate business credit profile, Paydex score, and documentation

stages.name: Application Preparation
stages.description: Prepare required documents, business plans, and financial statements

stages.name: Application Submission
stages.description: Submit credit applications to selected lenders

stages.name: Follow-up & Tracking
stages.description: Monitor application status and respond to requests

blockers: No live Supabase table for credit_funding data
No credit profile data proven live
nextSafeAction: Seed credit_funding_readiness table in Supabase; wire UI to live reads; populate checklist items from research
riskyActionsBlocked: Share sensitive documents with third parties
critical_note: All credit and funding activities require explicit Ray approval. No automated submission without manual review.
